appointments: Name of the special page and extension feature.
appointments-error-calendar-not-found: Error shown when a requested calendar does not exist.
appointments-error-no-permission: Error shown when the current user is not allowed to perform the requested action.
appointments-error-invalid-data: Error shown when request payload is invalid.
appointments-error-appointment-not-found: Error shown when a requested appointment does not exist.
appointments-error-invalid-date-time: Error shown when appointment date or time values are invalid.
appointments-error-data-must-be-array: Error shown when the generic appointment data payload is not an array.
appointments-error-data-not-serializable: Error shown when appointment data cannot be serialized to storage format.
appointments-error-end-before-start: Error shown when period end date/time is not after start date/time.
appointments-error-multiday-not-allday: Error shown when a multi-day period is defined without all-day flag enabled.
appointments-error-multiday-too-long-for: Error shown when multi-day period exceeds duration allowed by recurrence interval.
appointments-ui-create-new-calendar: Label for action in calendar picker that opens calendar creation dialog.
appointments-ui-new-appointment: Label for action button that opens appointment creation dialog.
appointments-ui-calendars: Label for calendars field in scheduler toolbar.
appointments-ui-field-calendar-name: Label for calendar name input field.
appointments-ui-field-calendar-descripti: Label for calendar description input field.
appointments-ui-field-calendar-event-typ: Label for event types selector in calendar editor.
appointments-ui-field-appointment-name: Label for appointment name input field.
appointments-ui-field-event-type: Label for event type selector in appointment editor.
appointments-ui-field-participants: Label for participants input field in appointment editor.
appointments-ui-field-notify-in-advance: Label for notify-in-advance toggle in appointment editor.
appointments-ui-field-location: Label for location input field in appointment editor.
appointments-ui-field-video-link: Label for video link input field in appointment editor.
appointments-ui-field-time: Label for appointment time section in appointment editor.
appointments-ui-date: Label for single-date input in appointment time section.
appointments-ui-time-start: Label for start time input in appointment time section.
appointments-ui-time-end: Label for end time input in appointment time section.
appointments-ui-date-start: Label for start date input in appointment time section.
appointments-ui-date-end: Label for end date input in appointment time section.
appointments-ui-all-day: Label for all-day toggle in appointment time section.
appointments-ui-recurrence: Label for recurrence selector in appointment time section.
appointments-ui-edit-calendar: Dialog title for creating or editing a calendar.
appointments-ui-create-calendar: Dialog title for creating a new calendar.
appointments-ui-edit-event-type: Dialog title for editing an existing event type.
appointments-ui-create-event-type: Dialog title for creating a new event type.
appointments-ui-edit-appointment: Dialog title for editing an existing appointment.
appointments-ui-create-appointment: Dialog title for creating a new appointment.
appointments-ui-save: Label for primary save action button in dialogs.
appointments-ui-cancel: Label for cancel/close dialog action button.
appointments-ui-edit: Label for edit action button/menu item.
appointments-ui-delete: Label for delete action button/menu item.
appointments-next-period: Tooltip/title for button that navigates the day or week scheduler to the next visible period.
appointments-previous-period: Tooltip/title for button that navigates the day or week scheduler to the previous visible period.
appointments-next-month: Tooltip/title for button that navigates the month calendar to the next month.
appointments-previous-month: Tooltip/title for button that navigates the month calendar to the previous month.
appointments-ui-delete-appointment-confi: Confirmation text shown before deleting an appointment.
appointments-ui-delete-appointment-faile: Error notification shown when deleting an appointment fails.
appointments-ui-delete-calendar: Label or tooltip for delete calendar action.
appointments-ui-delete-calendar-confirma: Confirmation text shown before deleting a calendar.
appointments-ui-delete-calendar-failed: Error notification shown when deleting a calendar fails.
appointments-ui-delete-event-type: Label or tooltip for delete event type action.
appointments-ui-delete-event-type-confir: Confirmation text shown before deleting an event type.
appointments-ui-delete-event-type-failed: Error notification shown when deleting an event type fails.
appointments-ui-calendar-options: Invisible label/tooltip for calendar options menu button.
appointments-ui-entity-type-options: Invisible label/tooltip for event type options menu button.
appointments-ui-load-calendars-failed: Error message shown when loading available calendars fails.
appointments-ui-load-calendar-failed: Error message shown when loading appointments for a selected calendar fails.
appointments-ui-field-participants-place: Placeholder text in participants input field.
appointments-ui-recurring-appointment: Tooltip for icon indicating that an appointment is recurring.
appointments-ui-view-day: Label for toolbar option that switches scheduler to day view.
appointments-ui-view-week: Label for toolbar option that switches scheduler to week view.
appointments-ui-view-month: Label for toolbar option that switches scheduler to month view.
appointments-more-appointments: Tooltip for overflow button in month view; $1 is number of hidden appointments.
appointments-view-appointment: Tooltip for action opening a single appointment details popup.
appointments-january: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-february: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-march: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-april: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-may: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-june: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-july: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-august: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-september: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-october: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-november: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-december: Calendar month label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-sunday: Calendar weekday label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-monday: Calendar weekday label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-tuesday: Calendar weekday label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-wednesday: Calendar weekday label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-thursday: Calendar weekday label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-friday: Calendar weekday label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-saturday: Calendar weekday label used by CalendarJS translation dictionary.
appointments-calendarjs-done: Label for CalendarJS confirmation action button.
appointments-calendarjs-reset: Label for CalendarJS reset action button.
appointments-ui-video-link-join: Label for button/link that opens the video conference URL in appointment viewer.
appointments-ui-field-entity-type-name: Label for event type name input field.
appointments-ui-field-entity-type-descri: Label for event type description input field.
appointments-ui-field-entity-type-color: Label for event type color selector.
appointments-birthday-event-type-name: Default name of built-in "birthday" event type.
appointments-meeting-event-type-name: Default name of built-in "meeting" event type.
appointments-vacation-event-type-name: Default name of built-in "vacation" event type.
appointments-travel-event-type-name: Default name of built-in "travel" event type.
appointments-ui-create-new-event-type: Label for menu option that opens event type creation dialog.
